design_concept: Moving from a rudimentary zebra-table to 'Account Group Cards'. Each account is a distinct rounded-2xl card with a highlighted header containing account meta, and nested SKU rows underneath. This improves scannability, handles 1-to-many relationships elegantly, breaks visual monotony, and fully aligns with the sibling 'premium leaderboard' aesthetic.

colors.background: bg-slate-50 (with subtle radial dot background already present in app)

sizes.account_code: text-[11px] font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

layout.account_card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group/card
layout.account_header: flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between p-4 sm:p-5 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50/80 to-white border-b border-slate-100 cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden
layout.sku_row: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-12 gap-3 sm:gap-4 px-4 sm:px-5 py-3 sm:py-4 border-b border-slate-50 last:border-0 hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors items-center cursor-pointer group/row

AccountHeader.description: The clickable header of the account card containing avatar, name, code, location, and optional badge.
AccountHeader.structure: Left: Avatar/Initials + Col(Name + Code Chip). Middle/Right: Location Pin + Location Text, 'Not in GOP' badge, ChevronRight.

classes.avatar: h-10 w-10 sm:h-12 sm:w-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800 to-slate-900 text-white flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-sm sm:text-base shadow-sm ring-2 ring-white
classes.code_chip: inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono font-medium bg-white text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm
classes.location: flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-slate-500 mt-2 sm:mt-0
classes.not_in_gop_badge: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border border-rose-200/60 shadow-sm
classes.chevron: text-slate-400 group-hover/card:text-slate-900 group-hover/card:translate-x-1 transition-all duration-300 hidden sm:block

SKURow.description: Individual SKU row inside the account card. Uses CSS grid for perfect alignment across the list. Mobile responsive.

classes.grid_layout: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-12 gap-2 sm:gap-4 items-center w-full
classes.grade_chip: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-medium border shadow-sm
classes.mobile_label: text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 sm:hidden font-medium

Pagination.description: Standard shadcn/ui pagination at the bottom of the list, styled with pill-shaped buttons to match the premium feel.

EmptyState.description: Empty state when no accounts match the filters.
EmptyState.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 px-4 text-center bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 border-dashed

motion.entrance_stagger: Apply staggered fade-in-up animations to account cards on mount using Framer Motion or CSS animation-delay (e.g., initial opacity 0, translate-y 10px, animate to opacity 1, translate-y 0, stagger 0.05s).
motion.hover_header: Chevron nudges right by 4px, entire card gains slight shadow-md.
motion.hover_row: Row background shifts to slate-50/50, revealing a subtle right-arrow indicator on the far right for interactivity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the redesign using the 'Account Group Card' layout defined in this JSON. Abandon the previous flat table with zebra stripes.
Map over the accounts and render an AccountCard container for each.
Inside each AccountCard, render the AccountHeader (clickable, routing to `/accounts/{account_id}`) and map over its SKUs to render SKURow components.
Ensure responsive behavior: On mobile, the SKU row should stack its columns (SKU info on top, Price and Credit below with mobile labels). On desktop, it should use the 12-column grid layout.
Apply the exact color-coded chips for Gold, Silver, and PET grades as specified in `colors.status`.
Format the 'Return Credit' in emerald-600 if it exists (>0), otherwise render a slate-300 '—'.
Wrap the list in the main container and integrate the existing shadcn pagination component below it.
Implement the staggered entrance micro-animations to align with the 'leaderboard' sibling screens.
